program: INVEST STAR - Full & Alt Doc (Investment Only)

general.max_dti: 50% when LTV <= 80%; 45% when LTV > 80%; 43% when living rent free; 45% when Interest Only
general.rural_allowed: YES - 680 Min FICO, Max 80% Purchase / 75% R&T / 70% Cash-Out, Max 10 acres, at least 2 comps within 5 miles, property must be on paved road (no dirt roads)
general.condotel_allowed: YES - 680 Min FICO, Max 75% Purchase / 70% R&T / 65% Cash-Out
general.prepay_options: Fixed percentage 1-5 year term with 5% fixed penalty; Declining structure starting at 5% with floor of 3%

income_doc.bank_statement_requirements: 2 Years self-employed in same business required

expense_ratio.expense_letter: Letter from CPA/accountant, IRS enrolled agent, or tax preparer subject to minimum total expense percentage of 10%
expense_ratio.pnl_expense: Expense factor provided on P&L prepared by CPA/accountant, IRS enrolled agent, or tax preparer subject to minimum total expense percentage of 10%

income_doc.dscr_calc: N/A - This is a Full/Alt Doc program, not DSCR

str.allowed: NO - This is a Full/Alt Doc investment program, not DSCR. STR not applicable.

rural.conditions: At least 2 comps must be within 5 miles of subject property. Property must be located on a paved road. No dirt roads.

citizenship.non_perm_resident: YES - Max 75% LTV Purchase / 70% R&T / 70% Cash-Out

credit_events.bk_seasoning: 36 months; 24 months by exception only (Max 75% LTV, Max $1,500,000 loan amount)
credit_events.fc_seasoning: 36 months; 24 months by exception only (Max 75% LTV, Max $1,500,000 loan amount)
credit_events.ss_seasoning: 36 months; 24 months by exception only (Max 75% LTV, Max $1,500,000 loan amount)
credit_events.housing_event: BK, FC, SS, FB, Mod all require 36 month seasoning; 24 month exception at Max 75% LTV / Max $1.5M
credit_events.mortgage_lates: 0x30x12 required for all mortgages; 1x30x12 by exception only (Max 75% LTV, Max $1,500,000 loan amount)
credit_events.covid_forbearance: Eligible if all missed payments repaid or 3 regular payments over 90 days paid after forbearance ended

product.fixed_products: 30 Year fixed or 40 Year fixed interest only
product.escrows: Escrow waiver allowed with conditions, see client guide. Max LTV 80% for stacking, Min FICO 720
product.cash_out_max: $500,000 max cash in hand for LTV > 65%; No limit for LTV <= 65%
product.delayed_financing: Eligible when property purchased for cash within 180 days of loan application; Purchase loan/LTV limits apply

reserves.description: 0 Months PITIA when LTV <= 65%; 6 Months PITIA when LTV > 65%; Purchase - 3 Months PITIA with credit score >= 720 and LTV <= 80; 12 Months PITIA for loan amounts > $1,500,000 regardless of LTV

property.appraisal: Approved AMC required, SSRs required unless transferred. SFR-1004, 2-4 Units-1025, Condo-1073. Dated within 120 days of Note. Desk review required on all loans or CU Score 2.5 or less with restrictions.

borrower.first_time_investor: Must own primary residence for 12 months during last 3 years (Max 80% LTV)
borrower.exposure: Max $5,000,000 or 15 properties to one single borrower
borrower.tradelines: 1 active tradeline rated 24 months AND 2 tradelines rated 12 months open or closed; OR 1 mortgage tradeline rated 12 months open/closed in last 24 months AND 1 additional tradeline

program: ALL STAR - Full & Alt Doc (Primary & Second Home)

general.max_dti: 50% when LTV <= 80%; 45% when LTV > 80%; 43% for Asset Qualifier; 45% for Income Lift; 43% when living rent free; 45% when Interest Only
general.rural_allowed: NO - Max 10 acres, no rural properties
general.condotel_allowed: YES - 680 Min FICO, Max 70% Purchase / 70% R&T / 65% Cash-Out
general.foreign_national: YES - 680 Min FICO, default score 680 when US credit unavailable, $150,000 min loan, 12 months reserves, Second Home only

investment.note: Investment not eligible under ALL STAR Full/Alt Doc. See INVEST STAR programs.

alt_doc: 1 Year Profit & Loss (CPA/EA/CTEC/Tax Attorney prepared and signed)
Asset Qualifier (assets post-close > 110% of loan amount + reserves; income = qualified assets / 60 months)
Asset Income Lift (income = qualified assets / 120 months; must pair with Full Doc, Bank Statements, or 1099)
income_doc.bank_statement_requirements: 2 Years self-employed in same business required

expense_ratio.expense_letter: Letter from CPA/accountant, IRS enrolled agent, or tax preparer subject to minimum total expense percentage of 10%
expense_ratio.pnl_expense: Expense factor on P&L prepared by CPA/accountant, IRS enrolled agent, or tax preparer subject to minimum total expense percentage of 10%

income_doc.1yr_pnl_requirements: Min 700 FICO, Min $150,000 loan, Max $2,000,000 loan, 12 months PITIA reserves, Max 45% DTI, CPA/EA/CTEC/Tax Attorney must attest filing of most recent business tax return, 2 months recent bank statements to support P&L income, Primary Residence Only, No stacking LTV or Fees

str.allowed: NO - Not applicable for Full/Alt Doc owner-occupied/second home program

rural.full_doc: NO - No rural properties allowed on ALL STAR
rural.alt_doc: NO - No rural properties allowed on ALL STAR

citizenship.foreign_national: YES - 680 Min FICO, default 680 when US credit unavailable, $150,000 min loan, 12 months reserves, Second Home only. See guide for visa requirements.

credit_events.housing_event: BK, FC, SS, FB, Mod all require 48 month seasoning
credit_events.mortgage_lates: 0x30x12 required for all mortgages. All mortgages must be current at closing.
credit_events.covid_forbearance: Eligible if all missed payments repaid or 3 regular payments over 90 days paid after forbearance ended

product.fixed_products: 30 Year fixed or 40 Year fixed interest only
product.cash_out_max: $500,000 max cash in hand for LTV > 65%; No limit for LTV <= 65%
product.texas_cashout: Max 80% LTV, financed points cannot exceed 80% LTV, 12 day waiting period required
product.delayed_financing: Eligible when property purchased for cash within 180 days of loan application; Purchase loan/LTV limits apply
product.secondary_financing: Max CLTV restricted to max qualifying LTV

reserves.description: 0 Months PITIA when LTV <= 65%; 6 Months PITIA when LTV > 65%; Purchase - 3 Months PITIA with credit score >= 720 and LTV <= 80; 12 Months PITIA for loan amounts > $1,500,000 regardless of LTV; 12 Months PITIA for foreign nationals; 12 Months PITIA for P&L income type

property.appraisal: Approved AMC required, SSRs required unless transferred. SFR-1004, 2-4 Units-1025, Condo-1073. Second appraisal required for loan amounts > $2,000,000. Dated within 120 days of Note. Desk review required on all loans or CU Score 2.5 or less with restrictions.

borrower.exposure: Max $5,000,000 or 15 properties to one single borrower
borrower.tradelines: 1 active tradeline rated 24 months AND 2 tradelines rated 12 months open or closed; OR 1 mortgage tradeline rated 12 months open/closed in last 24 months AND 1 additional tradeline
borrower.concessions: 6% for LTV < 80%; 4% for LTV > 80%. Must be used for closing costs and prepaids.
borrower.gift_funds: Allowed with min 5% borrower contribution at max 80% LTV; or no borrower contribution to max 75% LTV on Primary Home; min 10% borrower contribution for Second Home
borrower.gift_equity: Allowed with min 5% borrower contribution at max 80% LTV; or no borrower contribution to max 75% LTV on Primary Home; min 10% borrower contribution for Second Home

general.max_dti: N/A - DSCR program, no DTI calculation
general.rural_allowed: NO - No rural properties on DSCR
general.condotel_allowed: YES - 680 Min FICO, Max 75% Purchase / 70% R&T / 65% Cash-Out
general.foreign_national: YES - US Citizen only required for 5-10 units; otherwise 680 Min FICO, default 680 when US credit unavailable, $150,000 min loan, 12 months reserves, Min DSCR 1.00
general.io_available: YES - Requires 700 FICO and max 75% LTV (standard); 700 FICO max 70% LTV for sub-1 DSCR
general.prepay_options: Fixed percentage 1-5 year term with 5% fixed penalty; Declining structure starting at 5% with floor of 3%. Not allowed in AK, KS, MN, NM, RI (no restrictions on 5-10 unit in KS, MN, NM, RI). Allowed with conditions in IL, MS, NJ, OH, PA.

dscr_075_to_099.restrictions: 2-4 Units and Condos Max LTV Purchase 75% / Refinance 70%; IO requires 700 FICO and max 70% LTV; Vacant properties ineligible for refinances; 5% LTV reduction on declining markets; Min $150,000 loan; No Non-Warrantable Condo; No Condotel; 0x30x12 mortgage history; No first time investors; 12 months reserves required

dscr_below_075.restrictions: Same as DSCR 0.75-0.99 restrictions plus: LTV > 65% max cash out $500,000; LTV < 65% max cash out $1,000,000

5_10_unit.restrictions: Min 1.10 DSCR, Min FICO 680, Min unit size 500 sq ft, No STR, Max UPB $3MM (5% LTV reduction >$2MM), 6 mo min reserves (12 mo for >$1.5MM), 1 unit may be unleased/vacant on RT/CO (75% market rent for qualifying), No Mixed Use, US Citizen only, Min $250,000 loan, 0x30x12 mortgage history, Correspondent not eligible

income_doc.dscr_calc: Rental income divided by PITIAA. Lesser of lease or Form 1007/1025. Vacant properties use 1007/1025 (no LTV restrictions). 1007/1025 may be used for gross rents if within 20% tolerance of actual lease. Lease may be used with 2 months canceled checks to support higher rent.
income_doc.dscr_min: No minimum - sub-0.75 DSCR and No Ratio both supported with LTV restrictions
income_doc.sub1_allowed: YES - DSCR 0.75-0.99 allowed with restrictions (see LTV grid); DSCR below 0.75 also allowed with further LTV reductions

str.proof_requirements: Purchase and Refinance: 100% of income documented by 12-month history of deposits from eligible sources like Airbnb or VRBO. Purchase Only: 75% of income documented by 1007 or property management report.
str.fico_min: 700 for 75% max LTV purchase; 680 minimum for program entry
str.ltv_adjustments: Max 75% Purchase / 70% R&T / 70% Cash-Out. Additional: 75% max LTV purchase requires 700 FICO.
str.additional_restrictions: 0x30x12 mortgage rating required; Max $1,500,000 loan amount; Not permitted on 5-10 unit properties
str.fico_ltv_limits_cashout: FICO 680-719 and LTV > 70% OR FICO 660-679 and LTV > 65%: Max $750,000 loan / Max $100,000 cash out proceeds

rural.dscr: NO - No rural properties on DSCR

citizenship.foreign_national: YES - 680 Min FICO, default 680 when US credit unavailable, $150,000 min loan, 12 months reserves, Min DSCR 1.00. Not eligible for 5-10 units or correspondent.

credit_events.housing_event: 36 months for BK, FC, SS, FB, Mod
credit_events.mortgage_lates: 1x30x12 for primary and subject mortgage. 5-10 unit requires 0x30x12. 0x30x12 required on all cash-out refi with qualifying score below 700, all cash-out refi with LTV > 70%, and all DSCR ratios < 1.
credit_events.covid_forbearance: Eligible if all missed payments repaid or 3 regular payments over 90 days paid after forbearance ended

product.fixed_products: 30 Year fixed or 40 Year fixed interest only
product.cash_out_max: $500,000 max cash in hand for LTV > 65%; No limit for LTV <= 65%
product.delayed_financing: Eligible when property purchased for cash within 180 days of loan application; R&T loan/LTV limits apply
product.cash_out_seasoning: No seasoning for R&T appraised value. 3 months for cash-out (max lesser of $750,000 or purchase price + improvements, min 680 FICO). 6 months for cash-out with no additional restrictions. No seasoning for inheritance/divorce/separation.
product.land_contract: Eligible as R&T refinance if seasoned 12 months with 0x30x12 payment history supported by canceled checks

reserves.description: 6 Months PITIA unless: Purchase 3 Months PITIA with credit score >= 720 and LTV <= 80; 12 Months PITIA for loan amounts > $1,500,000; 12 Months PITIA for DSCR < 1.00; 12 Months PITIA for foreign nationals; 12 Months PITIA for > 80% LTV. Loan proceeds can be used for reserves.

borrower.experience: Must own investment property for 12 months during last 3 years. 5-10 unit requires experience owning 2+ unit property on purchase (case-by-case exceptions).
borrower.first_time_investor: Must own primary residence for 12 months during last 3 years (Max 75% LTV). 5-10 unit: first time investors not permitted.
borrower.exposure: Max $5,000,000 or 15 properties to one single borrower
borrower.tradelines: 1 active tradeline rated 24 months AND 2 tradelines rated 12 months open or closed; OR 1 mortgage tradeline rated 12 months open/closed in last 24 months AND 1 additional tradeline. If reporting on credit for 12 months, most recent 60 days not required.
borrower.concessions: Not to exceed 6%, must be used for closing costs and prepaids

property.appraisal: Approved AMC required, SSRs required unless transferred. SFR-1004/1007, 2-4 Units-1025, Condo-1073/1007, 5-10 unit-FHLMC 71A. Dated within 120 days of Note. Desk review required on all loans or CU Score 2.5 or less with restrictions.
property.insurance: Rent loss coverage equal to 6 months qualifying rent; Liability coverage equal to $100,000

general.max_dti: N/A - DSCR program, no DTI calculation
general.rural_allowed: NO - Property up to 10 acres not meeting rural definition is eligible, but rural properties are not eligible
general.condotel_allowed: YES - 5% LTV reduction from matrix. FL condos with LTV > 70% require Full Condo Review.
general.io_available: YES - Min 660 FICO, Max LTV Purchase/R&T 75%, Cash-Out 70%. IO DSCR calculated using ITIA.
general.prepay_options: 5% of unpaid principal balance. Not allowed in AK, KS, MD, MI, MN, NM, OH 1-2 Units, RI, VT. Additional state restrictions: IL natural person < 8% APR required; MS step down required; NJ titled owner must be entity; PA 1-2 Units > $329,411.

income_doc.dscr_calc: Refer to Guidelines for Long Term Rental and Short Term Rental calculation methods
income_doc.dscr_min: No minimum - No Ratio / below 0.75 DSCR supported down to 600 FICO
income_doc.sub1_allowed: YES - DSCR 0.99-0.75 supported down to 620 FICO; No Ratio / below 0.75 supported down to 640 FICO
income_doc.no_ratio: YES - Supported with LTV restrictions (see grid)

str.proof_requirements: Refer to Guidelines for STR documentation
str.fico_min: 680 for Purchase (Max 80% LTV); 720 for R&T (Max 75%); 720 for Cash-Out (Max 70% for $1M-$1.5M); 680 for Purchase up to $1.5M at 75%
str.ltv_adjustments: Purchase Max 80% (680 FICO); R&T Max 75% (720 FICO); Cash-Out Max 75% (720 FICO) for < $1M; Max 70% for $1.5M-$2M

rural.acreage_limit: 10 acres max (property up to 10 acres not meeting rural definition is eligible)
rural.conditions: Rural properties not eligible. Property up to 10 acres not meeting the rural definition is eligible.

citizenship.non_perm_resident: YES - With US Credit and acceptable VISA. Refinance Max 65% LTV.

credit_events.bk_seasoning: >=36 months no reduction; >=24 months: Purchase & R&T max 75% LTV, Cash-Out max 70% LTV
credit_events.fc_seasoning: >=36 months no reduction; >=24 months: Purchase & R&T max 75% LTV, Cash-Out max 70% LTV
credit_events.ss_seasoning: >=36 months no reduction; >=24 months: Purchase & R&T max 75% LTV, Cash-Out max 70% LTV
credit_events.housing_event: BK/FC/SS/DIL/Deferral/Modification: >=36 months no reduction; >=24 months with LTV caps
credit_events.mortgage_lates: 1x30x12 no reduction. 0x60x12: Purchase Max 70% LTV, Refinance Max 65% LTV. Borrowers must have complete 12-month housing history. Rent free not permitted (see exceptions).

product.io_available: YES - Min 660 FICO, Max Purchase/R&T 75%, Cash-Out 70%
product.loan_purpose: Purchase, Rate-Term, and Cash Out. Investment Business Purpose only.
product.occupancy: Investment Property only. Borrower or family members not permitted to live in subject.
product.appraisal: Loan amounts >= $2,000,000 require 2 appraisals. Desk Review on all loans with CU Score over 2.5 (exception: full second appraisal). Transferred appraisals acceptable.
product.declining_market: 5% LTV reduction off Matrix Max LTV as identified by appraiser
product.high_cost: State or Local High Cost not permitted

reserves.description: Loan <= $1.5M: No reserves. Loan > $1.5M: 2 months PITIA. Loan > $2.5M: 6 months PITIA. Cash-Out can be used to satisfy reserve requirements. Min 30-day asset verification required.

first_time_investor.definition: First time investor is a borrower not meeting experienced investor definition of having history of owning and managing commercial or non-owner occupied residential real estate for at least 1 year in last 3 years.
first_time_investor.eligibility: Minimum credit score: per matrix. Housing history: no housing late payments in most recent 12 months. Living rent-free: not permitted.

rent_free_exceptions: Borrower lives in marital home (provide letter from spouse + evidence of spouse mortgage or lease)
Borrower sold primary home within past 6 months and purchasing primary home
Borrower owns primary home free and clear with proof taxes paid current
Documented 12-month payment history on other REO plus proof of ownership (not applicable for first time investor)
tradelines: 3 scores; OR 1 open and reporting 24 months; OR 2 open and reporting 12 months
